misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 No need to downplay Akainu,Mihawk or Dragon. The current situation on Holy land is BECAUSE of Dragon. Former Marineford is maybe under attack by Cross Guild. Akainu and his navy also fig
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 No need to downplay Akainu,Mihawk or Dragon. The current situation on Holy land is BECAUSE of Dragon. Former Marineford is maybe under attack by Cross Guild. Akainu and his navy also fighting right now. Everyone of these characters will have a important role.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Those eyes in his clouds wilL possess special abilities, and his weapon will also be a Devil Fruit. Imu will not only be strong but incredibly powerful. Look at Luffy with his Toon Force
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Those eyes in his clouds wilL possess special abilities, and his weapon will also be a Devil Fruit. Imu will not only be strong but incredibly powerful. Look at Luffy with his Toon Force; Imu with his magic book will possess an enormous variety of abilities.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 I remember people saying that Luffy had reached his final level with Gear 5 against Kaido, and that the gap to his EoS level was minimal. But this chapter, and also Egghead, still shows
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 I remember people saying that Luffy had reached his final level with Gear 5 against Kaido, and that the gap to his EoS level was minimal. But this chapter, and also Egghead, still shows that Luffy can achieve far more. Be it Joyboy's insane Haki or the fact that the Imu Fruit is so versatile. Luffy has a lot of room for improvement. EoS Luffy could easily low diffing his Wano version. Luffy still has so much potential to improve and become stronger. In both haki and devilfruit power.

misc.title: #ToriyamaAkira sensei #DragonBall I ended up keeping the entire Dragon Ball box set— including the volume(26) with my cover illustration—sealed in its box. Without even being able to unwrap it, withou
misc.text: #ToriyamaAkira sensei #DragonBall I ended up keeping the entire Dragon Ball box set— including the volume(26) with my cover illustration—sealed in its box. Without even being able to unwrap it, without ever touching the book… Unable to show others the volume with my cover… Unable to even see it myself… And yet, perhaps because of that… I feel even more honored, more grateful, and more deeply moved— to have been given this moment of appreciation and respect for the legendary mangaka sensei.

misc.title: Si Planeta saca esto, me lo compro 🫡 Boichi (@Boichi_Bo1) #ToriyamaAkira sensei #DragonBall I ended up keeping the entire Dragon Ball box set— including the volume(26) with my cover illustration—seal
misc.text: Si Planeta saca esto, me lo compro 🫡 Boichi (@Boichi_Bo1) #ToriyamaAkira sensei #DragonBall I ended up keeping the entire Dragon Ball box set— including the volume(26) with my cover illustration—sealed in its box. Without even being able to unwrap it, without ever touching the book… Unable to show others the volume with my cover… Unable to even see it myself… And yet, perhaps because of that… I feel even more honored, more grateful, and more deeply moved— to have been given this moment of appreciation and respect for the legendary mangaka sensei. — https://nitter.net/Boichi_Bo1/status/2040316402234700130#m
